name: OPTiM Corporation
summary: OPTiM Corporation provides business-use smart device-related solutions in Japan. The company offers OPTiM Cloud Internet of Things OS services and apps; OPTiM Store, which offers a platform for selling business apps to suit various needs; Optimal Biz, which allows an IT administrator to manage IT devices in an office; and Optimal Remote, a support tool to provide support and reduce diagnostic time, as well as a maintenance tool to control terminals located in distant places. It also provides Unlimited Software, an all-you-can-use software service that provides software and e-books; Optia, which enables screen-sharing and remote operation for smartphone users; and OPTiM Caf√É¬©, a service that allows screen sharing without adapter for devices. In addition, the company offers Optimal Guard that enables users to stop/delete detected malware; and Optimal Diagnosis & Repair, a tool that diagnoses troubles and clarifies/repairs the cause of malfunctions on a device, as well as provides secure shields for mobile devices. Further, it provides e-books, digital magazines, and software packages for individual and business customers. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
